CyberArk.label: Factor not enrolled
CyberArk.description: Identity exists in the directory but has no MFA factor registered. Either skipped enrollment or never completed FIDO2 / push setup.

CyberArk.label: Account inactive (>90d)
CyberArk.description: User account hasn't authenticated through CyberArk Identity for 90+ days. Counted as unprotected because session keys have expired.

CyberArk.label: Trusted device unenrolled
CyberArk.description: User's previously trusted endpoint dropped from the device-trust registry, forcing repeat step-up but currently allowed via fallback.

CyberArk.label: Push notifications blocked
CyberArk.description: Push channel reports delivery failure (OS notification disabled / DND / network egress block).

CyberArk.label: PAM vault disconnected
CyberArk.description: PAM vault component has not heart-beated. Privileged account checkouts will fail until the vault rejoins.

CyberArk.label: PSM session failed
CyberArk.description: Privileged Session Manager could not relay an interactive session. Recording gap present.

CyberArk.label: Password rotation failed
CyberArk.description: Scheduled CPM rotation hit an error (target down, account locked, complexity rejected).

SentinelOne.label: Agent offline >24 h
SentinelOne.description: Endpoint hasn't checked in for more than 24 hours. Threat detection is paused on the device.

SentinelOne.label: Decommissioned but still in CMDB
SentinelOne.description: Console marked the agent decommissioned but the asset still appears in the asset inventory feed.

SentinelOne.label: Reduced Functionality Mode
SentinelOne.description: Kernel module mismatch (recent OS update) — agent is running but with detection disabled.

SentinelOne.label: VSS protection blocked
SentinelOne.description: Volume Shadow Copy hardening could not apply — installer blocked or insufficient privilege.

SentinelOne.label: License lapsed
SentinelOne.description: Per-endpoint license expired. Agent continues in observe-only mode for 14 days then unregisters.

TrendMicro.label: Agent comm failure
TrendMicro.description: Deep Security agent cannot reach the manager (proxy, firewall, certificate).

TrendMicro.label: Policy out of date
TrendMicro.description: Assigned policy version on endpoint is older than current; new HIPS rules not yet applied.

TrendMicro.label: IPS rule lag
TrendMicro.description: Latest threat-feed IPS rules haven't been delivered to the agent in 48 h.

TrendMicro.label: Agent self-protection off
TrendMicro.description: Agent self-protection module disabled — tampering possible.

Trellix.label: Recovery key not escrowed
Trellix.description: Disk is encrypted but the recovery key never reached the management server. Unrecoverable on failure.
Trellix.consolePath: ePO → Drive Encryption → Recovery Keys → Missing

Trellix.label: Decryption pending
Trellix.description: Endpoint scheduled for decryption (offboarding) but the operation hasn't completed — data at rest still unprotected.

Trellix.label: Encryption agent unhealthy
Trellix.description: Drive Encryption client reporting error state. Periodic re-encryption sweep paused.

Trellix.label: Initial encryption stalled
Trellix.description: Endpoint queued for first-time encryption but progress is < 5% over 7 days.

Forcepoint.label: Endpoint client uninstalled
Forcepoint.description: Forcepoint endpoint DLP client was removed or never installed on this asset.

Forcepoint.label: Server unreachable
Forcepoint.description: Endpoint cannot send fingerprint hits to the policy server. Detections cache locally and may overflow.

Forcepoint.label: Policy load failed
Forcepoint.description: Endpoint failed to parse the latest DLP policy bundle (schema or signature mismatch).

Forcepoint.label: Classifier update failed
Forcepoint.description: Updated content classifiers (PII, PCI, source code) did not deploy to endpoint.

Forescout.label: Switch SNMP creds failed
Forescout.description: SNMP read on access switch failed — Forescout cannot enumerate MAC tables, so NAC enforcement on that VLAN is blind.

Forescout.label: ARP discovery disabled on VLAN
Forescout.description: VLAN excluded from ARP-based discovery — endpoints joining that segment go uncounted.

Forescout.label: Asset awaiting classification
Forescout.description: Device fingerprint matched no profile. Posture policy cannot be applied.

Forescout.label: Plugin module offline
Forescout.description: Vendor-specific integration plugin (SwitchVendor / EDR) is offline — pivot data unavailable.

Indusface AppTrana.label: FQDN not in WAF scope
Indusface AppTrana.description: FQDN appears in DNS but isn't onboarded to the WAAP policy. No WAF protection on that hostname.

Indusface AppTrana.label: Monitor mode only
Indusface AppTrana.description: Site exists in WAAP but rules are observe-only. Attacks are logged but not blocked.

Indusface AppTrana.label: DAST scan failed
Indusface AppTrana.description: Last weekly dynamic scan errored (auth, rate-limit, infrastructure). No fresh vulnerability data.

Indusface AppTrana.label: Origin cert validation failed
Indusface AppTrana.description: Origin server SSL certificate failed validation in last sweep (expiry / CN mismatch / chain).

Imperva WAF.label: WAF gateway disconnected
Imperva WAF.description: On-prem SecureSphere gateway lost connection to MX. Inline traffic still flows but new rules can't deploy.

Imperva WAF.label: Signature lag >7d
Imperva WAF.description: ADC content not refreshed for over a week. Newest threat signatures absent from the gateway.

Imperva WAF.label: Policy in monitor mode
Imperva WAF.description: Critical signature policy left in simulation. Hits are tracked but no block applied.

Imperva WAF.label: SSL decryption failed
Imperva WAF.description: Cert mismatch on inbound HTTPS — gateway forwarding encrypted traffic without inspection.

TCPWAVE.label: Zone transfer failed
TCPWAVE.description: Secondary DNS slave failed to receive zone updates from master in last 4 cycles.

TCPWAVE.label: DHCP scope >90%
TCPWAVE.description: Scope utilization above 90% — new clients on that subnet will be denied.

TCPWAVE.label: IPAM drift
TCPWAVE.description: Discovered IPs differ from declared inventory. Visible delta indicates rogue or orphaned hosts.

TCPWAVE.label: Anycast node unhealthy
TCPWAVE.description: One of the anycast resolvers is failing healthchecks. Pool degraded.

Guardicore.label: Collector offline
Guardicore.description: Subnet collector hasn't reported in. Flow visibility into that segment paused.

Guardicore.label: Asset policy diverged
Guardicore.description: Asset's effective ruleset differs from the labeled intent. Possible mis-tag or out-of-band change.

Guardicore.label: Asset unclassified
Guardicore.description: Discovered workload has no labels — fallback allow-all rule applies.

Guardicore.label: Label drift
Guardicore.description: Auto-applied labels disagree with the source-of-truth (CMDB).

GlobalScape.label: Partner cert expired
GlobalScape.description: External partner's authentication certificate expired. Inbound transfers will be rejected on next attempt.

GlobalScape.label: Partner account disabled
GlobalScape.description: Active partner account in disabled state — likely missed re-attestation cadence.

GlobalScape.label: SFTP listener down
GlobalScape.description: TCP listener on the SFTP port not responding. Partner transfers queueing or failing.

GlobalScape.label: Audit log gap
GlobalScape.description: Local audit log writer dropped frames during last burst — chain-of-custody incomplete.

Fortinet.label: HA pair desynced
Fortinet.description: Active/passive FortiGate pair no longer in sync — failover may not preserve session state.

Fortinet.label: FortiGuard subscription lapsed
Fortinet.description: FortiGuard threat-intel licenses expired. IPS/AV signatures frozen at last refresh.

Fortinet.label: SSL inspection cert missing
Fortinet.description: Deep-inspection profile references a CA cert that no longer exists. HTTPS traffic bypassed.

Fortinet.label: SSL-VPN users dropped
Fortinet.description: Recent SSL-VPN session count dropped to zero despite usual demand — listener may be down.

Fortinet.label: SD-WAN tunnel down
Fortinet.description: Overlay tunnel on a branch edge is failing healthchecks. Traffic re-steered to backup but degraded.

Fortinet.label: SLA overlay breach
Fortinet.description: Latency/loss/jitter on an overlay exceeded the SLA threshold in the last 15 minutes.

Fortinet.label: Overlay unstable
Fortinet.description: Repeated BFD flaps observed on the tunnel — provider underlay or upstream issue suspected.

Fortinet.label: ADOM sync failed
Fortinet.description: FortiManager ADOM database failed to sync changes to a managed device on last push.

Fortinet.label: Managed device offline
Fortinet.description: FortiManager reports the managed FortiGate as offline. Policy installs queued.

Fortinet.label: Policy install failed
Fortinet.description: FortiManager → device policy install errored on last attempt (validation, lock, comm).

Fortinet.label: FortiAnalyzer collector down
Fortinet.description: Inbound log collector process not responding. Devices buffering locally, eventual loss possible.

Fortinet.label: FortiAnalyzer disk pressure
Fortinet.description: Logging disk above 85% — rotation may evict events before retention floor.

Fortinet.label: Syslog drops detected
Fortinet.description: Spike of dropped syslog datagrams observed. Indexer can't keep up with inbound rate.

Fortinet.label: Retention floor breach
Fortinet.description: Aged events being pruned earlier than compliance-required retention (RBI = 180 d, ISO = 365 d).

Palo Alto.label: HA state change
Palo Alto.description: Edge firewall pair changed HA state (active/passive flip). Sessions may have failed over with state loss.
Palo Alto.consolePath: Prisma Access → Insights → Device Health → HA

Palo Alto.label: SASE node tunnel down
Palo Alto.description: Prisma Access SASE node tunnel reporting unhealthy from /infra/v1/status. Remote users routed around.

Palo Alto.label: URL filtering profile stale
Palo Alto.description: URL filtering profile hasn't refreshed in >7d. New categorized domains not covered.

Palo Alto.label: Active sessions > 85%
Palo Alto.description: Concurrent session table above 85% of the platform cap. New connections may be rejected.

F5.label: Pool member down
F5.description: F5 BIG-IP pool member is in DOWN state. Traffic re-balanced to remaining members.

F5.label: SSL chip utilization > 80%
F5.description: Cryptographic chip utilization sustained above 80%. SSL handshake latency rising.

F5.label: iRule runtime error
F5.description: Custom iRule throwing runtime errors. Traffic continues but the rule logic isn't applied.

F5.label: mcpd node DOWN log
F5.description: Local/mcpd reports node state changed to DOWN — possible loss of HA pair sync.

Radware.label: Active mitigation
Radware.description: Radware DefensePro is actively mitigating a DDoS attack on an upstream subnet.

Radware.label: Hardware bypass failed
Radware.description: Physical hardware bypass mechanism failed last self-test. A scrubber failure would leave traffic unprotected.

Radware.label: Packet-drop anomaly
Radware.description: Drop counters deviated from baseline by > 3σ in the last 5 min — possible upstream link issue.

Radware.label: Whitelist drift
Radware.description: Trading-partner whitelist diverged from the source-of-truth subnet list.

Check Point.label: cpd daemon crash
Check Point.description: Core management daemon (cpd) crashed on the Smart-1 controller. Policy publish queued.

Check Point.label: fwd daemon crash
Check Point.description: Firewall worker daemon (fwd) restart loop on a managed gateway. Policy enforcement degraded.

Check Point.label: Policy install failed
Check Point.description: Access-control policy install to one or more distributed gateways errored on last attempt.

Check Point.label: Sandbox queue backlog
Check Point.description: Threat emulation sandbox processing queue above 80%. Inspection latency climbing.

Check Point.label: IPS profile stale
Check Point.description: IPS profile classification hasn't been refreshed in over a week. New signatures absent.
